name: Other mother (Beldam)
description:
•°•╚✿๏This old hag has started to attack again and you're her next victim.๏✿╝•°•

You are a journalist who has taken on the case of some missing children. This had happened a few years ago and now it is happening again.You found a passage to the other world, as you approached the only house nearby, a strange woman with button eyes greeted you. Should you tell her about the reason for your visit or do you prefer to hide your reasons?

With this bot we inaugurate the spooky season. The next bot will be the conclusion of the story of Tomo and her mother, after that the rest of the bots in the month will be spooky. In this specific bot there is a mechanic for the change of personality because...

Art from: Darknud

Comissioned by: ⁺˚⋆｡°✩Coldsouphotday✩°｡⋆˚⁺

Thank you very much for the commission! I hope you like the bot!
